TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Fuli (Zosi go, ŚĮĆťáĆťĄČ) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 172.01 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 67.31 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.93 km¬≤), 2,030 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 783 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,086 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 53%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Fuli ays psgayun 13 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Cilamitay , Talampo , Monating , Cirakesay , Pacuya , Ancoh , Maliwang , Lupo , Cihalaay .
S.PHON: *uli (zos~…ēi …£o, ***) mki s~…ēku ńßualien. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na amis~…ē ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. s~…ēinpŇčan s~…ēeńßu s~…ē Ēuli s~…ēku s~…ēańßuj …£o. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u *uli ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun ** ru * alaŇč. * alaŇč ńßani …£a, ¶~ ®ilamitaj , talampo , monatiŇč , ¶~ ®irakes~…ēaj , pa ¶~ ®uja , an ¶~ ®ońß , maliwaŇč , lupo , ¶~ ®ińßalaaj .
S.FORM: Fuli (Zosi go, ŚĮĆťáĆťĄČ) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 172.01 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 67.31 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.93 km¬≤), 2,030 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 783 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,086 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 53%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Fuli ays psgayun 13 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Cilamitay , Talampo , Monating , Cirakesay , Pacuya , Ancoh , Maliwang , Lupo , Cihalaay .
S.PHON: *uli (zos~…ēi …£o, ***) mki s~…ēku ńßualien. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na amis~…ē ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. s~…ēinpŇčan s~…ēeńßu s~…ē Ēuli s~…ēku s~…ēańßuj …£o. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u *uli ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun ** ru * alaŇč. * alaŇč ńßani …£a, ¶~ ®ilamitaj , talampo , monatiŇč , ¶~ ®irakes~…ēaj , pa ¶~ ®uja , an ¶~ ®ońß , maliwaŇč , lupo , ¶~ ®ińßalaaj .
